extraFilter.description: This represents the filter in RSQL form.
extraFilter.example: et=notnull='' and et=bt=('1601543231033','1601543242493') and cat=in=('OUTAGE','DETERIORATION') and se!='cleared' and acs=='critical' and pc=eqic='hardware*' and pwo='CR-GEN-061020-1601972090840' or insid=isnull=''

severity.description: This represents the severity of the alarm.

classification.description: This represents the classification of the alarm.

geographyL1Name.description: This represents the level 1 geography name.

geographyL2Name.description: This represents the level 2 geography name.

geographyL3Name.description: This represents the level 3 geography name.

geographyL4Name.description: This represents the level 4 geography name.

description.description: This represents the description of the alarm.

serviceAffected.description: This represents the service affected by the alarm.

senderName.description: This represents the name of the sender.

entityType.description: This represents the entity type of the alarm.

subEntity.description: This represents the sub-entity related to the alarm.

subEntityIn.description: This represents the sub-entity related to the alarm.

entityNames.description: This represents the entityNames of the alarm.

entityServiceType.description: This represents the entity service type.

alarmExternalId.description: This represents the external ID of the alarm.

entityName.description: This represents the name of the entity.

entityId.description: This represents the ID of the entity.

nokiaAlarmMeta.description: This represents the Nokia alarm metadata.

technology.description: This represents the technology related to the alarm.

probableCause.description: This represents the probable cause of the alarm.

operator.description: This represents operator used for aging comparison
